name: vatvit/freshen-php
description: Stale-while-revalidate cache with stampede prevention (single-flight recompute + jittered TTLs).

scripts-descriptions.test: Run the unit suite (deterministic, no live backends).
scripts-descriptions.test:integration: Run the live-Redis lane; needs ext-redis + a Redis (see scripts/php-redis-it.sh).
scripts-descriptions.coverage: Write a Clover report to build/clover.xml (needs a coverage driver, e.g. PCOV).
scripts-descriptions.coverage:gate: Measure coverage and enforce the floor, excluding the Redis driver.
